$note: Manual flow: convert an e-invoice document from one format to another (here CII/UBL input to a Factur-X hybrid PDF) and save the result to Directus Files. Replace the sample XML with {{ $trigger.payload.xml }} or a value from an earlier step. Load it with: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node examples/import.mjs convert-format.flow.json. Add your key as the BELIQ_API_KEY env var (or set the operation's API Key).

flow.name: beliq - Convert invoice format
flow.description: Convert an e-invoice to another format and save it to Directus Files.
